title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Archon is a tool used to build benchmark matrices that test different configurations of LLM-powered workflows. Cole Medin demonstrates its capability to run the same coding task four different ways against real GitHub issues, enabling comparative evaluation of provider combinations.
